scope.summary: OAuth rejected-bearer responses keep a uniform public invalid_token challenge with no error_description, while the typed rejection category is retained only in the operator audit trail.
out_of_scope: Any change to accepted-token validation semantics.
Any live external OAuth provider or network identity-provider run.

entry_points.name: core HTTP OAuth rejection audit/challenge contract
entry_points.trace: `env -u CARGO_TARGET_DIR cargo test -p oraclemcp-core oauth_rejections_keep_one_challenge_and_audit_the_fixed_reason -- --nocapture` exited 0 with 1 passed; it proves bad-signature and expired presented bearers produce byte-identical `WWW-Authenticate` headers with `error="invalid_token"` and no `error_description`, while the operator audit records `oauth_bad_signature` and `oauth_expired`.

entry_points.name: literal JWT negative wire fixture
entry_points.trace: `env -u CARGO_TARGET_DIR cargo test -p oraclemcp-core --test c1_oauth_literal_jwt c1_negative_tokens_share_one_opaque_challenge -- --nocapture` exited 0 with 1 passed; it proves distinct rejected literal JWTs share the same opaque public challenge and do not expose `error_description`.

entry_points.name: binary HTTP OAuth e2e rejection contract
entry_points.trace: `env -u CARGO_TARGET_DIR cargo test -p oraclemcp --test e2e_http_oauth binary_http_oauth_rejects_missing_invalid_and_insufficient_tokens -- --nocapture` exited 0 with 1 passed; it proves the running binary HTTP path returns metadata-only for missing bearer, `invalid_token` without description for malformed presented bearer, and `insufficient_scope` for authorization failure.

entry_points.name: auth crate challenge renderer
entry_points.trace: `env -u CARGO_TARGET_DIR cargo test -p oraclemcp-auth metadata_and_challenge_render -- --nocapture` exited 0 with 1 passed; it proves the resource-server challenge renderer emits `invalid_token` without `error_description`.

limitations: This close is scoped offline proof; it does not claim a live external OAuth provider run.
This close does not run a workspace-wide Cargo gate.
Dirty files outside this bead's source scope remain in the shared checkout; they are excluded from tree_clean by the close auditor.
